fixtures.data_recipe: Generate 24 nearby points with label_column populated.
fixtures.current_expected_weakness: Dense labels can now use MCP-exposed label_column plus deterministic max_labels, priority_column, skip_column, static offset/fanout, and point_label_skips diagnostics; remaining weakness is true collision-aware automatic placement.
fixtures.desired_polish_behavior: Further collision-aware labels or contrast diagnostics only when required; current slice reports skipped labels with actionable evidence.
fixtures.acceptance_command: python hub_uv.py run python -m pytest tests/test_bridge_renderer.py tests/test_mcp_rendering.py tests/test_plot_type_registry.py -q

fixtures.data_recipe: Generate 8 series with this-work and reference groups.
fixtures.current_expected_weakness: Basic series hierarchy controls now exist; remaining weakness is legend ordering/layout for many emphasized and muted series.
fixtures.desired_polish_behavior: Legend title/order/ncol make the hierarchy readable without bespoke matplotlib while preserving existing layout presets.
fixtures.acceptance_command: python hub_uv.py run python -m pytest tests/test_mcp_normalization.py tests/test_mcp_rendering.py -q

fixtures.data_recipe: Generate categorical x labels longer than 18 characters.
fixtures.current_expected_weakness: Long categorical tick labels can now be opt-in truncated with tick_style.max_label_chars while preserving original tick text on formatter metadata; remaining weakness is automatic recommendation/rotation selection.
fixtures.desired_polish_behavior: Readable visual tick labels without changing source data/config semantics.
fixtures.acceptance_command: python hub_uv.py run python -m pytest tests/test_bridge_renderer.py tests/test_mcp_rendering.py -q

fixtures.data_recipe: Generate 2x2 panels with long axis labels and panel titles.
fixtures.current_expected_weakness: Rows and columns are supported, but mosaic/span and fine layout polish are absent.
fixtures.desired_polish_behavior: Panel spacing remains readable and diagnostics catch title/axis collisions.
fixtures.acceptance_command: python hub_uv.py run python -m pytest tests/test_mcp_batch_quality.py tests/test_manuscript_compose.py -q

fixtures.data_recipe: Add dark hspan or fill_between overlay plus text annotation.
fixtures.current_expected_weakness: Tagged annotation region/hspan/vspan and manual fill_between overlays are now checked against overlapping annotation text with contrast-ratio diagnostics; remaining weakness is automatic color restyling, which is intentionally out of scope for diagnostics v1.
fixtures.desired_polish_behavior: Diagnostics warn with affected annotation and overlay identity when overlapping text/overlay contrast is below threshold; no automatic style mutation.
fixtures.acceptance_command: python hub_uv.py run python -m pytest tests/test_geometry_diagnostics.py tests/test_bridge_renderer.py tests/test_mcp_rendering.py -q

fixtures.data_recipe: Generate log x and log y data spanning several decades.
fixtures.current_expected_weakness: Axis scale and tick format presets exist; remaining weakness is automatic diagnosis-driven format recommendation for crowded log ticks.
fixtures.desired_polish_behavior: Readable tick labels and diagnostics for crowding.
fixtures.acceptance_command: python hub_uv.py run python -m pytest tests/test_bridge_renderer.py tests/test_geometry_diagnostics.py -q

fixtures.data_recipe: Place a callout arrow near a dense cluster.
fixtures.current_expected_weakness: Smart Callout v1 provides deterministic offsets and presets; remaining weakness is density-aware diagnostics or automatic quadrant choice.
fixtures.desired_polish_behavior: Callout diagnostics warn when preset placement remains near dense data.
fixtures.acceptance_command: python hub_uv.py run python -m pytest tests/test_bridge_renderer.py -q

fixtures.data_recipe: Generate several series occupying all quadrants.
fixtures.current_expected_weakness: Legend collision diagnostics, bounded per-panel legend controls, and multipanel shared legend placement now exist; remaining weakness is deeper architecture/data-contract cleanup rather than legend polish.
fixtures.desired_polish_behavior: Shared multipanel legends can be controlled without bespoke matplotlib; future work should preserve this contract while reducing renderer/MCP duplication.
fixtures.acceptance_command: python hub_uv.py run python -m pytest tests/test_geometry_diagnostics.py tests/test_bridge_renderer.py -q
